'''sobathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:azabicyclic|azabicyclic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-b-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:azabicyclic|azabicyclic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sobathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || sobathithi || sobathiji || sobathishi || sobathiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || sobathuthu || sobathuju || sobathushu || sobathuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || sobathuthu || sobathuju || sobathushu || sobathuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || sobathufthuf || sobathufjuf || sobathufshuf || sobathufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || sobathethe || sobatheje || sobatheshe || sobatheke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || sobathotho || sobathojo || sobathosho || sobathoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || sobathotho || sobathojo || sobathosho || sobathoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || sobathofthof || sobathofjof || sobathofshof || sobathofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || sobathïfthïf || sobathïfjïf || sobathïfshïf || sobathïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || sobathïfthïf || sobathïfjïf || sobathïfshïf || sobathïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || sobathïfthïf || sobathïfjïf || sobathïfshïf || sobathïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || sobathïfthïf || sobathïfjïf || sobathïfshïf || sobathïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || sobathæthæ || sobathæjæ || sobathæshæ || sobathækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || sobathatha || sobathaja || sobathasha || sobathaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || sobathatha || sobathaja || sobathasha || sobathaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || sobathafthaf || sobathafjaf || sobathafshaf || sobathafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || sobathasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || sobathshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || sobathroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || sobathmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || sobathyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gosobathnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gosobathnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gosobathnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gosobathnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || sobabathasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || sobabathshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || sobabathroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || sobabathmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || sobabathyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gosobabathnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gosobabathnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gosobabathnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gosobabathnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || sebæthasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || sebæthshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || sebæthroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || sebæthmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || sebæthyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gosebæthnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gosebæthnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gosebæthnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gosebæthnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || sobfathasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || sobfathshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || sobfathroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || sobfathmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || sobfathyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gosobfathnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gosobfathnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gosobfathnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gosobfathnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
